mapper.select:
select p.id, p.plan_code as planCode, p.plan_name as planName, p.source_type as sourceType, p.source_id as sourceId, p.target_type as targetType, p.target_id as targetId, p.owner_user_id as ownerUserId, u.real_name as ownerUserName, p.start_date as startDate, p.due_date as dueDate, p.status, p.priority, p.effect_review as effectReview, p.closed_at as closedAt, ( select count(1) from improve_plan_action a where a.plan_id = p.id and a.is_deleted = 0 ) as actionCount, ( select count(1) from improve_plan_action a where a.plan_id = p.id and a.is_deleted = 0 and a.status in ('COMPLETED', 'VERIFIED') ) as completedActionCount, case when p.due_date < current_date and p.status not in ('COMPLETED', 'VERIFIED') then 1 else 0 end as overdueFlag, p.remark from improve_plan p left join sys_user u on u.id = p.owner_user_id and (u.is_deleted = 0 or u.is_deleted is null)
order by overdueFlag desc, p.priority desc, p.updated_at desc, p.id desc limit #{offset}, #{size}
